versions.version_description: I have included the intricacies of the different parts that the current chord charts do not show - and also how to play extra parts such as the lead vocal for the chorus. It is also tabbed so that it can be played without a capo (as the other charts state 'capo on fret 2'.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Newly revised. Includes strumming patterns and improved chord placement.

content:
Ghost by Ella Henderson
Album: Chapter One
2014


Standard Tuning
Capo on the 2nd fret


Chords:

C:        x32010
G:        320003 or 320033
Em:       x22000
D:        xx0232
Am:       x02210


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
 I keep going to the river to pray[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
 'Cause I need something that can wash all the pain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
 And at most, I'm sleeping all these demons away[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
 But your ghost, the ghost of you it keeps me awake[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
 My friends had you figured out[/tab]

 Yeah they saw what's inside of you
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
 Trying to hide in another you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
 But your evil was coming through[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
 These guys sitting on the wall[/tab]

 They watch every move I make
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
 Bright light living in the shade[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
 You go hard makes the spirit shake[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
 I had to go through hell to prove[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
 I'm not insane[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
 Had to meet the devil just to know his name[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]
 And that's where my love was burning[/tab]

 Yeah it's still burning


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
 I keep going to the river to pray[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
 'Cause I need something that can wash all the pain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
 And at most, I'm sleeping all these demons away[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
 But your ghost, the ghost of you it keeps me awake[/tab]

 I keep going to the river to pray[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
 And at most, I'm sleeping all these demons away[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
 But your ghost, the ghost of you it keeps me awake[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Each time that I think you go[/tab]

I turn around and you're creeping in
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
And I let you under my skin[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
'Cause I love living in a sin[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Boy you never told me[/tab]

True love was going to hurt
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
True pain that I don't deserve[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Truth is that I never learn[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
 I keep going to the river to pray[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
 Give up the ghost[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
 Give up the ghost[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
 Give up the ghost[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
 Stop the haunting baby[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
 Give up the ghost[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
 Give up the ghost[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
 Give up the ghost [/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
 No more haunting baby[/tab]

 I keep going to the river
